Phoenix Auto Recycling

About our Phoenix crew

Locally owned, licensed, and cleaning the Valley one car at a time.

Est. 2004

Local People.
Clean Practices.

Phoenix Auto Recycling is a locally run team that buys junk cars, converters, and scrap metal with **zero hidden fees**. We handle the paperwork, even if the title is missing.

Bilingual Dispatch (EN/ES)
Real-time Scrap Pricing
EPA Compliant Partners
Licensed Legal Processing
